item.title: Forging Butterfly Hinges with Fly Press
item.description: A blacksmithing project using a fly press to make butterfly hinges. Shows shaping, forming, and finishing metal hardware with precision and traditional techniques.

media:content.media:title: Forging Butterfly Hinges with Fly Press
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing project using a fly press to make butterfly hinges. Shows shaping, forming, and finishing metal hardware with precision and traditional techniques.

item.title: Black Bear Forge Small Coal Fire Shovel
item.description: Hand-forged small shovel built for coal fires. A practical blacksmithing project showing traditional metalworking and workshop craftsmanship from start to finish.

media:content.media:title: Black Bear Forge Small Coal Fire Shovel
media:content.media:description: Hand-forged small shovel built for coal fires. A practical blacksmithing project showing traditional metalworking and workshop craftsmanship from start to finish.

item.title: Viking-Inspired Blacksmithing at Black Bear Forge
item.description: Traditional blacksmithing inspired by Viking-era design. Watch skilled forging techniques at Black Bear Forge as metal is shaped into a handcrafted tool with historic style and detail.

media:content.media:title: Viking-Inspired Blacksmithing at Black Bear Forge
media:content.media:description: Traditional blacksmithing inspired by Viking-era design. Watch skilled forging techniques at Black Bear Forge as metal is shaped into a handcrafted tool with historic style and detail.

item.title: Traditional Blacksmithing Tongs Forging Process
item.description: Hand-forged tongs made using traditional blacksmithing methods. A detailed workshop process showing metal shaping, heating, and forming durable gripping tools.

media:content.media:title: Traditional Blacksmithing Tongs Forging Process
media:content.media:description: Hand-forged tongs made using traditional blacksmithing methods. A detailed workshop process showing metal shaping, heating, and forming durable gripping tools.

item.title: Hand-Forged Modern Candle Holder Design
item.description: A blacksmithing project creating a modern-style candle holder. Watch metal shaped, heated, and formed into a clean, functional decorative piece using traditional forging techniques.

media:content.media:title: Hand-Forged Modern Candle Holder Design
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing project creating a modern-style candle holder. Watch metal shaped, heated, and formed into a clean, functional decorative piece using traditional forging techniques.

item.title: Forging a Slitting Chisel by Hand
item.description: A detailed blacksmithing process showing how a slitting chisel is forged from raw steel. Focus on heating, hammering, and shaping a precise, durable workshop cutting tool.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Slitting Chisel by Hand
media:content.media:description: A detailed blacksmithing process showing how a slitting chisel is forged from raw steel. Focus on heating, hammering, and shaping a precise, durable workshop cutting tool.

item.title: Forging an Axe from a Railroad Spike
item.description: Step-by-step blacksmithing process transforming a railroad spike into a functional axe. Shows heating, shaping, and finishing techniques for a durable handcrafted tool.

media:content.media:title: Forging an Axe from a Railroad Spike
media:content.media:description: Step-by-step blacksmithing process transforming a railroad spike into a functional axe. Shows heating, shaping, and finishing techniques for a durable handcrafted tool.

item.title: Forging Steel Scraps into Utility Hooks
item.description: Blacksmithing process transforming steel scrap into strong, functional hooks. Demonstrates heating, shaping, and finishing techniques to create practical handmade workshop hardware.

media:content.media:title: Forging Steel Scraps into Utility Hooks
media:content.media:description: Blacksmithing process transforming steel scrap into strong, functional hooks. Demonstrates heating, shaping, and finishing techniques to create practical handmade workshop hardware.

item.title: Hand-Forged Small Metal Scoop
item.description: Traditional blacksmithing process creating a small forged scoop. Watch steel heated, shaped, and finished into a simple and functional handmade tool for everyday use.

media:content.media:title: Hand-Forged Small Metal Scoop
media:content.media:description: Traditional blacksmithing process creating a small forged scoop. Watch steel heated, shaped, and finished into a simple and functional handmade tool for everyday use.

item.title: Forging Tools from a Garage Door Spring
item.description: Blacksmithing process transforming a garage door spring into useful tools. Shows heating, cutting, and shaping steel into durable handcrafted workshop items.

media:content.media:title: Forging Tools from a Garage Door Spring
media:content.media:description: Blacksmithing process transforming a garage door spring into useful tools. Shows heating, cutting, and shaping steel into durable handcrafted workshop items.

item.title: Restoring Old Chisels by Hand
item.description: Blacksmithing restoration process bringing old chisels back to life. Focus on cleaning, reshaping, and sharpening steel tools for renewed workshop performance and durability.

media:content.media:title: Restoring Old Chisels by Hand
media:content.media:description: Blacksmithing restoration process bringing old chisels back to life. Focus on cleaning, reshaping, and sharpening steel tools for renewed workshop performance and durability.

item.title: Forging a Spring Steel Butcher Tool
item.description: Blacksmithing process shaping spring steel into a durable butcher tool. Demonstrates heating, forming, and finishing techniques for a strong, functional cutting implement.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Spring Steel Butcher Tool
media:content.media:description: Blacksmithing process shaping spring steel into a durable butcher tool. Demonstrates heating, forming, and finishing techniques for a strong, functional cutting implement.
